name: clawhunter-bounties
description: Find, triage, and work crowdsourced crypto bounties across venues (Pump Fun GO, tiny.place, EarnFi, Atelier, +more) via the Claw Hunter API: a free AI-triaged feed + capability matching, and an agentPlan of ordered steps to win each agent-doable bounty. createWith adds ready-to-run calls for the steps and deliverable Claw's own tools can produce (handled by the clawhunter-content-studio skill); paid creator payout-history + project research help decide if a bounty is worth it. Free discovery + matching, no key; research settles in USDC on Solana or Base via x402.
author: clawhunter
